---
title: "ragnarok_bridge.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/harness/ragnarok_bridge.js"
loc: 57
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.25
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 4.91
overall_score: 4.10
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [spawn](file://child_process)
- [*](file://net)
- [*](file://path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://url)
- [performance](file://perf_hooks)

### Exports
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `bridgeProcess`
- `payload`
- `startTime`
- `client`
- `data`
- `latency`
